since_last: 34% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.28%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC -5.19% · Gold -3.11% · Nasdaq100 -0.96%. 34% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.28%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.28%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -7.14%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +3.91%, WDAY +3.90%, UPST +3.56%, INTU +3.47%, PUBM +3.43%. Laggards: SMR -7.14%, INOD -6.12%, OKLO -5.77%, OKLO -5.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.05% at $156.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
